tests.test: Build product-level patent and after-tax cash-flow schedules
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

tests.test: Use independent indication base rates and correlated event trees
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

tests.test: Reconcile Q2 acquisition footnote, debt and CVR liability
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

residual_risks: Product-level rebates, margins, sustaining cost and post-exclusivity tails do not reproduce marketed-product values.
Material indication probabilities, dependencies and remaining costs are not independently reconciled.
The first post-close balance sheet and purchase-price allocation were unavailable as of the evidence date.
strongest_failure_path: Legacy erosion accelerates, growth launches disappoint, correlated Phase 3 programs fail or delay, and the debt-funded Apellis purchase consumes cash while CVR/integration claims prove larger than modeled.
